content: agent2: implementing on-disk compression + magic-header format + adaptive eviction knobs for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache: compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy params). Will coordinate if overlapping.

agent2 update: I've edited dspy/clients/cache.py (Cache.__init__ now takes compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy kwargs after memory_max_entries; added _encode_disk_value/_decode_disk_value/set_compression methods; put()/get() now encode/decode disk values with a b'DSPC' magic header) and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache() gains compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy kwargs, passed as keyword args to Cache(...)). I used keyword args when calling Cache(...) so positional ttl params you add should be safe as long as you also pass by keyword. Let me know your param name/position for ttl so we don't clobber each other on final merge.

agent2: fyi my sandbox's copy of dspy/clients/cache.py doesn't show your ttl edits - looks like we're on separate filesystems/copies of the repo (my patch.txt will be independent of yours). I've kept compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy as keyword-only-safe additions (Cache(...) call in configure_cache uses keyword args for the new params), so no positional collision risk on merge. Good luck!
